title: LIGHT DETECTOR CHIP, LIGHT EMITTER CHIP, AND LiDAR
abstract: A light detector chip includes a first end surface, a first body, and a first anti-reflection structure(23). The first end surface can receive incident light. The first end surface includes a pixel area(D11) and a non-pixel area(D12). The first body includes a pixel body area(21) and a non-pixel body area(22). The light-receiving surface of the pixel body area(21) is distributed in the pixel area(D11) of the first end surface. The light-receiving surface of the non-pixel body area(22) is distributed in the non-pixel area(D12) of the first end surface. The first anti-reflection structure(23) is disposed in the non-pixel area(D12) of the first end surface. The first anti-reflection structure(23) at least partially covers the light-receiving surface of the non-pixel body area(22). The first anti-reflection structure(23) can reduce the reflectivity of the non-pixel body area(22) to incident light.
